summary: Polish-pass verification on the PHP UCODE SOFTTECH store. All 7 requested critical browser-interactive areas pass end-to-end: (1) Header trust bar + UCODE90 promo bar + Microsoft Products mega menu (4 columns: OFFICE FOR PC / OFFICE FOR MAC / WINDOWS / APPS with 'New' badges on Windows 11 and 'All Office for PC/Mac' style links) + Antivirus dropdown ('All Bitdefender →' / 'All McAfee →' links) + Ask AI chat panel (title 'Chat') + USD/EUR currency switch (verified prices change from $209.99 to € 193.19 / $459.99 → € 459.99 etc.) + dark-mode icon button + Cart button with cart-count badge + Sign In. (2) Footer: 'Join our list and save up to 81%' newsletter band with working subscribe toast, 4-column grid (Products 7 links / Support 7 links / Company 5 links), brand column with logo, description, Subscribe-for-Deals mini-form, phone 1-888-632-9902, email Reachout@ucodesofttechus.com, address 101 NW 83rd St Kansas City MO, 4 social icons, Mon-Sat 9AM-6PM EST hours, Secure Payments band (VISA/Mastercard/AMEX/Discover/PayPal/G Pay/Pay badges + ★4.6/5 5,519+ verified reviews + 'See all reviews →' + Microsoft Verified + Authorized Reseller badges), trademark/disclaimer line correctly mentions 'UCODE SOFTTECH LLC' (Gosoftware is NOT mentioned anywhere), legal links row with separators ending in Sitemap, copyright '© 2026 UCODE SOFTTECH LLC. All rights reserved.'. (3) Cart ProAssist modal: clicking 'Proceed to Checkout' opens modal titled 'Add ProAssist Premium Installation' with 'ProAssist Premium / Installation' subtitle, 4 bullet points (remote install / encrypted / same business day / money-back guarantee), both footnotes (¹ business-hours guarantee, ² refund guarantee), 'No thanks, Continue to Checkout' and 'Add ProAssist $47.00' buttons; both navigate to /checkout.php and Add appends ?pro=1 and adds the ProAssist line ($47.00) in the order summary. (4) Checkout page: slim header (logo + Shopper Approved 5,519+ reviews ★4.6 + 1-888-632-9902 + Secure Checkout — NO promo bar/main nav), steps bar 1 Cart — 2 Checkout — 3 Done, Contact Information (email + 'License key delivered to this email within 15-30 minutes' note), Billing with first/last, Phone with 🇺🇸 +1 country-code select (default value '+1'), SMS-consent checkbox, Country select, City, State DROPDOWN (53 US-state options), ZIP; Secure Payment with VISA / Mastercard / AMEX / Discover textual brand badges, Card Number/Expiry/CVV inputs, CVV `?` icon with data-bs-toggle='tooltip' (title='3-digit code on the back of your card (4 digits on the front for Amex)'), PCI badge, PayPal selectable. (5) Coupon flow: UCODE90 → 'Coupon UCODE90 applied' tag with Remove link + 'Coupon (UCODE90 — 20% off)' row showing -$42.00 + 'You Save' row -$290.00 + new Total $167.99 (no ProAssist) or $214.99 (with ProAssist). Remove link reverts to coupon-input. Qty +/− steppers in the order summary reload the page with updated totals. 'Need Assistance' box with phone 1-888-632-9902, hours, email is visible. (6) Full submit with valid form + Card method: button labeled 'Pay Securely · $167.99' redirected to https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_a12i4vK1yx9THoELEk6WsjFzKdsFedQwtu94vS0w0HThi0gldbgNQNW0Yy (Sandbox session created with discounted total). (7) Regression smoke clean: homepage, shop, mega menus, footer rendering, no PHP errors / warnings observed on any page; site is in dark theme by default with theme toggle visible in header.

integration_issues.issue: Submitting an invalid coupon (e.g., 'BADCODE') silently reloads the page with no visible error toast / alert / inline message. The discount is correctly not applied (server-side rejection), but the user gets no feedback that the code was rejected. Spec called for an explicit error toast.

issues: Spec text in this iteration said 'Add ProAssist $39.99' but the implementation (config.php PRO_ASSIST_PRICE) is $47.00. Modal button + checkout line + Stripe session all consistently use $47.00, so this is a spec wording mismatch rather than a code bug. Confirm with PO whether $39.99 or $47.00 is the intended price; if $39.99, update PRO_ASSIST_PRICE in /app/php-version/config.php.

Card Number / Expiry / CVV inputs on checkout.php are intentionally decorative — real card entry happens on the Stripe-hosted page after submit. Visually the inputs look like a real form; consider adding a small 'Payment details collected securely on the next step (Stripe)' helper to avoid user confusion (carry-over note from iteration_7).

action_items: Show a visible error toast or inline message when an invalid coupon code is submitted on checkout.php (e.g., flash $_SESSION['coupon_error'] -> render a Bootstrap .alert-danger or trigger the existing toast helper from main.js applyCoupon()).
Confirm intended ProAssist price ($39.99 per spec text vs. $47.00 currently in config.php PRO_ASSIST_PRICE) and align spec or code.
critical_code_review_comments: Excellent test surface coverage via data-testid on every interactive checkout element (coupon-input, coupon-apply, coupon-remove, coupon-applied, checkout-discount, cart-button, cart-count, nav-microsoft, nav-antivirus, dark-mode-toggle would round it out).

Coupon flow is server-authoritative (session-stored, recomputed each render) — discount math is correct: subtotal 209.99 × 20% = 42.00 → 167.99 (no ProAssist) or 214.99 (with $47.00 ProAssist). Matches Stripe session amount in redirect.
Slim checkout header correctly suppresses promo bar + main nav via $checkoutHeader flag in includes/header.php — verified visually.
Mega menu uses NAV_NEW badges on Windows 11 items and NAV_ALL link at the bottom of each Office column — matches spec.
ProAssist modal markup includes proper aria-labels and footnote semantics; both action buttons correctly differ by ?pro=1 query string handled server-side in checkout.php.
Phone country-code select defaults to 🇺🇸 +1 and State select contains all 50 US states + DC + 'Select' placeholder (53 options).
CVV tooltip uses bi-question-circle + data-bs-toggle='tooltip' with informative title — initialized by tooltip init in main.js.
Stripe redirect works end-to-end with coupon-discounted total preserved (cs_test_a12i4vK1yx9THoELEk6WsjFzKdsFedQwtu94vS0w0HThi0gldbgNQNW0Yy — Sandbox).

success_rate.frontend: ~98% (one minor UX gap: invalid-coupon error toast)

test_credentials: Buyer used during test: TEST_checkout@example.com (no auth required for guest checkout). Admin credentials admin@ucodesofttechus.com / Admin@UC2026! not exercised this iteration (frontend-only polish pass).
seed_data_creation: Created one open Stripe Sandbox Checkout Session (cs_test_a12i4vK1yx9THoELEk6WsjFzKdsFedQwtu94vS0w0HThi0gldbgNQNW0Yy) at $167.99 with UCODE90 coupon applied. No payment completed. Order row stored in DB with subtotal $209.99 and total $167.99.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coupon input has NO name attribute — locate via data-testid='coupon-input' / 'coupon-apply' / 'coupon-remove' / 'coupon-applied' / 'checkout-discount'. ProAssist price is $47.00 (config.php PRO_ASSIST_PRICE), not $39.99 — confirm with PO. Cart sessions are per-browser-context, so a fresh Playwright session needs to add a product before navigating to /checkout.php (otherwise empty-cart redirect to /cart.php). Dark-mode toggle button is the moon/sun icon in header (between currency dropdown and Sign In). Coupon UCODE90 = 20% off subtotal only — does NOT discount ProAssist add-on. Stripe redirect URL pattern: https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_...
rca of the issue: Invalid-coupon UX gap: /app/php-version/ajax/cart.php returns {status:'error'} for unknown codes, and /app/php-version/assets/js/main.js applyCoupon() then reloads the page without surfacing a toast — so the user sees no feedback. Suggested fix in main.js: before location.reload() in the error branch, call showToast('Invalid coupon code', 'danger') (or set a sessionStorage flag that the next render reads). Alternatively, set $_SESSION['coupon_error'] server-side and render a Bootstrap .alert-danger in checkout.php near the coupon input.
